title: Batch recall Anesketin 100 mg/ml Solution for Injection for Dogs, Cats and Horses
body: "We wish to inform veterinarians and wholesalers that Dechra Pharmaceuticals PLC have initiated a Class II recall to veterinarian level with immediate effect for:   Anesketin 100 mg/ml Solution for Injection for Dogs, Cats and Horses; GB Vm 16849/5002 and UK NI Vm 16849/3002.   The reason for the recall relates to the identification of visible particles present in the vials.  This recall is for the following batches of 10 ml vials only:     Batch number Expiry date     146534 28 Feb 2026   148216 31 May 2026   152285 30 Nov 2026   154450 28 Feb 2027   155130 28 Feb 2027     Dechra Pharmaceuticals PLC are contacting veterinarians and wholesalers to examine inventory immediately and quarantine products subject to this recall.  For further information regarding the recall, please contact Shaun Barford shaun.barford@dechra.com or +44 748 3915362. "
